title: Language Change - Houston Screen - Cancel
scenario: Language update fails and returns to home screen when headset is powered off during firmware update via Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Pair and connect the Poly Bluetooth headset to the Android device via the app.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. Select a different language from the list of available languages.
6. Tap 'Update Now' to trigger a firmware update for the selected language.
7. While the firmware update is in progress, turn off the headset (e.g., press and hold the Power button) to simulate an update failure.
8. Observe the Houston (error) screen that appears on the app.
9. Verify that an error message is displayed on the Houston screen.
expected: After tapping 'Cancel' on the Houston screen, the user is returned to the Home screen showing the currently connected device.
